ogTitle: Gymea Bay vs Haberfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gymea Bay and Haberfield.
heading: Gymea Bay vs Haberfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gymea Bay, New South Wales and Haberfield, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Haberfield has a lower overall climate risk score (48/100) compared to Gymea Bay (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gymea Bay or Haberfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gymea Bay has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Haberfield scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gymea Bay scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Haberfield scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gymea Bay or Haberfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Haberfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.72% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
